meaning: vt.制服,压倒,供给...过强的力量
examples: It took ten guardsmen to overpower him.
Police finally managed to overpower the gunman.
Were you afraid the prisoners would overpower you?
His current behavior betrays the tendency of his nature to overpower his impulse of pragmatic rhetoric.
Their acids are mouth-watering, while their softer tannins make them easy to drink and don't overpower the food.
